description_long: This is a modern storage bed with a light wood frame and a flat, rectangular shape. The bed features a smooth, light gray mattress on top, with no visible headboard or footboard. The front side is equipped with three blue drawers, each with a horizontal handle, and a larger wooden drawer beneath them, providing ample storage space. The sides and back of the bed are plain, showcasing the wood grain texture without any additional features. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for compact urban living spaces. The bed sits low to the ground, emphasizing its platform and storage-oriented construction.
description: A light wood platform storage bed with a gray mattress and multiple front-facing drawers, featuring a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plain wood grain panel with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_1: Front view displaying three blue drawers with handles and a larger wooden drawer beneath, all integrated into the bed frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with a plain wood grain panel and no visible storage features.
description_view_3: Back view showing a continuous wood panel with no drawers, handles, or other features.
